message:
fix: isTruthy(0n) returned true (bigint zero was truthy), CURRENT ROW consumed any identifier

Two minor SQL correctness fixes:

1. isTruthy(0n) returned true while isTruthy(0) returned false — bigint
   zero should be falsy in SQL (WHERE 0 is false regardless of int type).
   Added val !== 0n check.

2. Parser's CURRENT ROW frame bound used match(IDENTIFIER) which consumed
   any identifier after CURRENT, not just ROW. Now checks lexeme === "ROW"
   specifically before advancing.
